title: The World Government’s Shadow
description: On pages 13–15, this part follows Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, King Harald, Unknown person #15, Loki, World Government as The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.
scene: The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That same year, the fishing village on Elbaf...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's no good!! My medical knowledge is too limited...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's call Harald and see if he can get us in touch with a more skilled doctor.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't... He's got a lot on his plate now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's the point of fostering a network with the world government if we don't use it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I can recover on my own.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You keep saying that, but you're getting weaker by the day!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have to get better! Harald will be heartbroken if you don't, you know?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Mato, keep the tavern open...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No way, how can I when you're this sick, IDA?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whenever Harald's home, he always goes straight to the elders...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and begs them to allow you two to legally marry.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That fool... he knows I'm happy with my tavern.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I enjoy befriending sailors from all over the world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It may not be much...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I feel like I'm helping Harald by doing that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hey!! Foreign HAG!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: LOK!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cook up this meat for the old hag, will ya?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The tavern's my main hangout spot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I want her to reopen it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Good grief, that trouble maker has grown out of hand.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm glad you've been able to keep him in line...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...even with hajrudin and his friends away...

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: ...Looking for a doctor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Your boys...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...really love you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Everyone's blowing this out of proportion.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'll be fine.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: But it does make me smile...:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Elbaf - Alcohol Village (Hometown of LOKI's Birth Mother)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What'd you just say?.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were talking about how utterly unbearable it'd be...

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: You're with us, right, loki?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're Estrid's relatives! She was Harald's True Wife! We can't let anyone have a claim on our inheritance!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why I slipped her a dose of poison...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THIS STuff IS FATAL... HER DAYS ARE NUMBERED!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mato!! We can't hold off on ringing Harald anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We may not be related by blood... but I see him the same way I do hajrubin...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: On it!!

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: Loki is still my cute little son...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: HEY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh!!! L-L-LOK!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: IDA isn't really gonna die, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I still remember my birth mother... she hated me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She had me thrown into the realm of the dead!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who gives a shit about inheritance?! Your whole family is nothing but trash!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: "Now answer!! IDA won't actually die. Right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: She's...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I bet you must get pretty lonely, right, look? Wouldn't it be better to stay with us?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...The only Mother I've ever known!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: His true feelings pour out!!

summary: This part advances The Weight of Elbaf’s Bloodline through 53 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
